allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(x['path']\) for x in data.get\('tree',[]\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(f['name']\) for f in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(f['name'], f['type']\) for f in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(r['full_name'], r.get\('description',''\)\) for r in json.load\(sys.stdin\).get\('items',[]\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['crate']; print\(d['description']\); print\('repo:', d.get\('repository',''\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('desc:', d.get\('description',''\)\); print\('url:', d.get\('html_url',''\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('workspaces', d.get\('dependencies',{}\)\), indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('name:', d.get\('name',''\)\); print\('deps:', json.dumps\(d.get\('dependencies',{}\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('name:', d.get\('name',''\)\); print\('deps:', json.dumps\(d.get\('dependencies',{}\), indent=2\)\); print\('optDeps:', json.dumps\(d.get\('optionalDependencies',{}\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) for f in d.get\('tree',[]\): if 'rust' in f['path'].lower\(\) or 'wasm' in f['path'].lower\(\) or 'napi' in f['path'].lower\(\) or 'Cargo' in f['path'] or f['path'].endswith\('.rs'\): print\(f['path']\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) for f in d.get\('tree',[]\): if 'rust' in f['path'].lower\(\) or 'wasm' in f['path'].lower\(\) or 'cgo' in f['path'].lower\(\) or 'ffi' in f['path'].lower\(\) or f['path'].endswith\('.rs'\) or 'Cargo' in f['path'] or 'shared' in f['path'].lower\(\): print\(f['path']\) ")
